name: May 2025 Dinner
description: Wide-ranging conversation covering mobile gaming economics, sales in the AI era, European accelerators, and the continued importance of technical co-founders.

topics.text: Mobile games are money makers — David shared how games at his previous company generated multiple millions per day
In sales, the human connection remains important, especially for high-touch sales
EWOR accelerator praised as a potential YC of Europe
Financial health for businesses — close attention to Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC)
Technical co-founders are still (maybe even more so) important in this new age of AI
Why are founders who are ex-Palantir crushing it?
Using Pydantic AI to rewrite Sano's codebase is working very well
